key.name: autohide-mode
key.description: How autohide should be handled

key.name: icon-size
key.summary: Logical pixel size of app launcher icons
key.description: Logical pixel size of app launcher icons

key.name: launchers
key.summary: An ordered array of app id's to show as launchers
key.description: An ordered array of app id's to show as launchers

key.name: widlet-workspace-enabled
key.description: When enabled, the workspace widlet section is shown on the right side of the dock.

key.name: widlet-weather-enabled
key.description: When enabled, the weather widlet is shown in the dock widlet section.

key.name: widlet-cpu-enabled
key.description: When enabled, the CPU widlet is shown in the dock widlet section.

key.name: widlet-ram-enabled
key.description: When enabled, the RAM widlet is shown in the dock widlet section.

key.name: widlet-cputemp-enabled
key.description: When enabled, the CPU temperature widlet is shown in the dock widlet section.

key.name: widlet-gpu-enabled
key.description: When enabled, the GPU widlet is shown in the dock widlet section.

key.name: widlet-harddisk-enabled
key.description: When enabled, the hard disk widlet is shown in the dock widlet section.

key.name: widlet-trash-enabled
key.description: When enabled, the trash widlet is shown in the dock widlet section.

key.name: widlet-order
key.description: Ordered list that controls how widlets are laid out in the dock area.

key.name: widlet-weather-minimal-mode
key.summary: Show weather widlet in minimal mode
key.description: When enabled, the weather widlet shrinks to dock icon width and shows full details on hover.

key.name: widlet-weather-location
key.description: Displayed city or place name for the weather widlet.

key.name: widlet-weather-latitude
key.description: Latitude used to request weather data from Open-Meteo.

key.name: widlet-weather-longitude
key.description: Longitude used to request weather data from Open-Meteo.

key.name: widlet-weather-unit
key.description: Controls whether weather temperatures are shown in Celsius or Fahrenheit.

key.name: widlet-weather-sim-enabled
key.description: When enabled, weather widlet values come from local preview controls instead of Open-Meteo.

key.name: widlet-weather-sim-weather-code
key.description: WMO weather code used by the weather widlet simulator.

key.name: widlet-weather-sim-temperature
key.description: Temperature value used by the weather widlet simulator.

key.name: widlet-weather-sim-hour
key.description: Hour of day (0-23) used by the weather widlet simulator and dynamic gradient preview.

key.name: now-playing-minimal-mode
key.summary: Show now playing in minimal mode
key.description: When enabled, only the album cover icon is shown in dock and track controls move to the hover tooltip.

key.name: now-playing-cover-animation
key.description: When enabled, the now playing cover artwork has a subtle motion effect while music is playing.

key.name: now-playing-seek-bar
key.description: When enabled, a subtle seek bar is shown for now playing and can be used to seek through the current track.
